SEARCH

Package cpdt.common.dto

package cpdt.common.dto
Provides the Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.

This package contains immutable data structures that encapsulate information exchanged between different system components. These objects are designed for efficient serialization, transmission, and processing, enabling reliable communication between the simulator, backend, and future client applications.

DTOs contain only data and intentionally exclude business logic, ensuring a clear separation between the system's communication model and its application logic.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Lakshmi Sanjeev
  • Record Classes
    Class
    Description
    AlertMessage
    Represents an alert generated by the backend and published to interested subscribers.
    DeviceStatusMessage
    Represents a device status update exchanged between system components.
    TelemetryPacket
    Represents a telemetry reading produced by a simulated device and exchanged between the simulator and backend.
